hero.sub: Independent audit and advisory services for Swiss SMEs and corporations. We create reliable decision-making foundations for stakeholders.

features.label: Our Core Values
features.headline: Reliability is non-negotiable.
features.sub: As a modern audit firm, we combine legal rigor with entrepreneurial sensitivity.
features.v1desc: In accordance with the strict guidelines of the Audit Chamber, we maintain absolute independence. We provide a purely objective and unbiased assessment of your annual financial statements according to Swiss standards.
features.v2desc: We don't simply tick off rigid checklists. Our focus is on the material risks of your business model and the key controls of your Internal Control System (ICS).
features.v3desc: Our audit doesn't end with the stamp. The structured management letter and our direct feedback to the board of directors deliver concrete added value for operational improvements.

about.label: About us
about.headline: Auditing as strategic added value for your company.
about.quote: «An audit is far more than mere compliance with Article 727 CO – it is a central quality mark for your company.»
about.p1: We combine solid methodology (Swiss GAAP, CO) with genuine entrepreneurial understanding. Through straightforward dialogue at management level, we secure processes and create structural trust for the future.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.intro: Many audits merely fulfil a legal obligation.
philosophy.statement: We understand auditing as the foundation for clarity, trust and sound decisions.

protocol.label: Audit Approach
protocol.headline: Methodical. Efficient. Focused.
protocol.sub: Our risk-oriented audit process guarantees the highest precision without unnecessarily straining your internal resources.
protocol.s1desc: Analysis of the business environment and identification of specific audit areas to define a tailored audit strategy.
protocol.s2desc: Targeted system and detailed tests. In-depth data analysis and critical assessment of your Internal Control System (ICS) are at the core of our approach.
protocol.s3desc: Comprehensive audit report for the general meeting and precise management letter to the board of directors with recommendations for process optimisation.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Audit areas that create security.
services.sub: As licensed audit experts RAB, we cover all relevant facets of Swiss auditing.
services.t1desc: The ordinary audit provides you, your investors and stakeholders with the highest degree of reliability. We scrutinise your ICS precisely and ensure strict compliance with the legal framework (e.g. CO 727, Swiss GAAP).
services.t2desc: Our limited audit is tailored for Swiss SMEs. It combines legal compliance with lean processes. We precisely identify risks without unnecessarily disrupting your operational business.
services.t3desc: Whether incorporations, capital increases or restructurings under the Merger Act: we provide reliable special audit reports that set decisive legal milestones for the future of your company.

partner.label: Strong Partnerships
partner.headline: We grow with the best.
partner.sub: As a modern audit firm, we audit and advise some of the most renowned companies. Trust that commits.

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline: Let's talk without obligation.
contact.sub: Do you have questions about auditing or would you like a first meeting? We are happy to assist you.
contact.name: Name

footer.tagline: Independent audit services and personal advisory in Switzerland. Targeted, reliable and professional.
